org: Fanghe Experimental High School Student Union

roles.title: Chairman of the Student Council
highlights: Led the student council and organized regular assembly meetings.
Coordinated extracurricular activities and facilitated communication between students and school administration.
Hosted official school ceremonies and represented student body interests.

roles.title: Section Chief, Student Rights Section
highlights: Managed student rights affairs and mediated disputes.
Collaborated with faculty to improve student welfare policies.

roles.title: Chairperson of Election Commission
highlights: Oversaw the design and execution of the student union election process.
Ensured fair, transparent, and well-administered elections.

org: Student Appeals Committee, Fanghe Experimental High School

roles.title: Student Representative
highlights: Reviewed student grievance cases and participated in formal hearings.
Drafted official resolutions to address student concerns fairly and effectively.
